title: JayWisdom Give-and-Get Return Proof
ui_claim_observed: This address supports all assets on Ethereum, Base, Polygon, and other EVM networks.
observations: The wallet receive screen visibly displays jaywisdom.base.eth.
The visible shortened address begins with 0xa38 and ends with 02e8.
The full address supplied by the user is 0xa380552a27b0a5a2874ea7aa52cac09f542002e8.
The screen presents a QR code and a Copy Wallet Address control.
permitted_statement: A user-supplied wallet receive screenshot displays jaywisdom.base.eth alongside a shortened address consistent in prefix and suffix with the full address supplied in the same conversation.
forbidden_promotions: The screenshot alone does not prove control of the wallet.
The screenshot alone does not prove control of jaywisdom.base.eth.
The screenshot alone does not independently verify ENS or Basename resolution.
The screenshot alone does not verify any EAS attestation binding.
A receive screen does not prove ownership of funds or prior transactions.

return_proof.give: User supplied the wallet receive screenshot and full EVM address.
return_proof.get: Repository receipt preserving the screenshot hash, observed UI association, full presented address, and proof limits.
